title: Intense Roasted Italian Mentaiko Tagliatelle
description: A roasted Italian dish featuring mentaiko and ferment jang, served in a terracotta dish, perfect for a brunch mood. This satvik friendly dish is made with tagliatelle and has a shattering texture.

ingredients.name: roasted vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as zucchini, bell peppers, and onions

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the tagliatelle according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large bowl, whisk together the mentaiko, ferment jang, and olive oil.
Add the cooked tagliatelle to the bowl and toss to combine with the mentaiko sauce.
In a large skillet, roast the garlic and vegetables over medium heat until tender.
Add the roasted vegetables to the bowl with the tagliatelle and toss to combine.
Transfer the tagliatelle mixture to a terracotta dish and top with grana padano cheese.
Bake the tagliatelle in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the dish from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the intense roasted Italian mentaiko tagliatelle hot, straight from the terracotta dish.
